message:
fix(proptest): fix false failures in proptest_dry_run and proptest_wait

- proptest_dry_run: prop_target_resolution_skip_none failed when domain
  contained field names like "cwd" — check JSON keys via parsed object
  instead of substring matching
- proptest_wait: prop_next_delay_monotonic failed when current_ms > max_ms
  because capping correctly reduces to max — add prop_assume guard

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
